posts.text: 🎇🇺🇸For first time in history a shuttered US #Nuclear power plant is being restarted as Palisades in #Michigan readies to return to service📶⚛️⚡️plus regulators are now reviewing plans to build 2 x 300MW small modular reactors at Palisades too!🤠🐂#Uranium https://www.michiganpublic.org/environment-climate-change/2026-07-06/federal-regulators-begin-review-of-plans-for-small-nuclear-reactors-at-palisades-plant

posts.text: This is basically the $LINC and $UTI thesis. We need to re-skill millions of workers and the ones who get re-skilled first, will get huge wages due to the shortages. A few thousand student body uptick, does a lot for a business with high fixed costs. Do the math. Think the Technical College trade has real legs...
